business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12; coinsurance 90%; deductible 50000; producer Texas Commercial Insurance Partners.
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Provides Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an equipment breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of utility services including water supply, communication supply, and power supply.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Policy - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

concerns: Vacancy condition may limit or exclude coverage if a building is vacant for more than 60 consecutive days before loss.
positives: Commercial property limits include Building 222340000, Contents 33432000, and Business Income 59212000.
Endorsements include Ordinance Or Law Coverage, Equipment Breakdown Coverage, and Utility Services — Direct Damage.
Operations are focused on commercial real estate investment and property management in Texas metropolitan areas.
